title: Ambientbasic
summary: Builds the ambient bundle, dilation action, straight metric data, the cone inclusion at rho = 0, and the straight normal-form interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Builds the ambient bundle, dilation action, straight metric data, the cone inclusion at rho = 0, and the straight normal-form interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/Ambientbasic.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: Ambient Bundle. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: Ambient Point Metric Bundle. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: ambient Proj. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: ambient Point Proj. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: rho Coord. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def rhoCoord : Conf.AmbientBundle → ℝ | (_, ρ) => ρ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: rho Point Coord. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def rhoPointCoord : Conf.AmbientPointMetricBundle → ℝ | (_, ρ) => ρ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: iota. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.

Definition: ambient Dilate. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ambientDilate (a : PosReal) : Conf.AmbientBundle → Conf.AmbientBundle | (u, ρ) => (Conf.dilateBundle a u, ρ)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ambient Point Dilate. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ambientPointDilate (a : PosReal) : Conf.AmbientPointMetricBundle → Conf.AmbientPointMetricBundle | (u, ρ) => (Conf.dilatePointMetricBundle a u, ρ)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ambient Point To Fiber. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ambientPointToFiber : Conf.AmbientPointMetricBundle → Conf.AmbientBundle | (u, ρ) => (Conf.pointToFiberBundle u, ρ)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ambient Trivialization. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: noncomputable def ambientTrivialization (s : Conf.Scale) : Conf.AmbientBundle ≃ ((PosReal × M) × ℝ)

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
